Weekly Raid Boss Report

Overview
Start Date 2026-04-13
End Date 2026-04-19
Duration 7 days
File Name raid_boss_20260413_7days.html
Raid - Type Cradle of the Stars
Raid - Max Level Killed 150
Raid - Guild Morale 21,638
Raid - Total Boss Damage 503,632,748
Raid - Total Boss Attacks 105
Raid - Total Participants 22
Name Team CompositionPowerResultBuffs
Pet H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 Team Boss Level Damage User % Total %
NauT
130
130
130
130
130
130
182K184K165K199K161K195K1.09M1601.05M74.37%0.21%
15
Survivor's Willpower
Defeating a Nightmare generated by Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions grants a 15-second 100% Vampirism aura to the entire team.
12
Immortal Hero
The hero that deals the most damage while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active gains Immortality for 12 seconds.
10
Chosen by the Stars
After a Meteor Shower, all Healers gain a buff that increases all healing dealt by 100% for the duration of 10 seconds.
+15%
Dreamer's Retaliation
All heroes on the team deal 15% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.
+20%
Nightmare's Energy
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the hero that generates the Nightmare gains 20% energy for damage dealt to it.
+20%
Marksman Opportunity
If a Marksman uses their ultimate while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active, they will recover 20% energy over 5 seconds.
3
Astral Shield
Triggers an Astral Shield once per battle. The Shield absorbs all damage from Defense Sphere explosions in the Wormhole. The Shield is triggered automatically when 3 or more Defense Spheres enter the Wormhole.
+25%
Healing Converter
25% of healing exceeding heroes' max health is converted into pure damage dealt to Defense Spheres.
-50%
Mage's Vigilance
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the Nightmares generated by Mages have 50% less health.
+10%
Keeper's Blessing
When Osh the Eternal Keeper awakens, the hero that dealt the most damage before the Planet Parade began will gain 10% more stats.
+2%
Sphere Energy Unleashed
Destroying a Defense Sphere grants 2% energy to the hero that deals the final hit.

Meteors of Haste
While Meteor Shower is active, all heroes boost their speed by 100%.

Wormhole Suppressor

Defense Sphere Destroyer

All heroes enter combat with 25% Energy.

Defense Sphere Override

Immortal Hero
The hero that deals the most damage while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active gains Immortality for 12 seconds.
+20%
Marksman Opportunity
If a Marksman uses their ultimate while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active, they will recover 20% energy over 5 seconds.
15
Survivor's Willpower
Defeating a Nightmare generated by Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions grants a 15-second 100% Vampirism aura to the entire team.
-10%
Stellar Tank Resilience
Tank heroes take 10% less damage from Defense Sphere basic attacks.
+20%
Nightmare's Energy
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the hero that generates the Nightmare gains 20% energy for damage dealt to it.
3
Astral Shield
Triggers an Astral Shield once per battle. The Shield absorbs all damage from Defense Sphere explosions in the Wormhole. The Shield is triggered automatically when 3 or more Defense Spheres enter the Wormhole.
+2%
Sphere Energy Unleashed
Destroying a Defense Sphere grants 2% energy to the hero that deals the final hit.
+10%
Keeper's Blessing
When Osh the Eternal Keeper awakens, the hero that dealt the most damage before the Planet Parade began will gain 10% more stats.
4
Insomnia
A single use of Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions can't unleash more than 4 Nightmares.
+25%
Healing Converter
25% of healing exceeding heroes' max health is converted into pure damage dealt to Defense Spheres.
Anophelus
130
130
130
130
130
130
155K125K203K174K170K169K995K16017.3M34.48%3.43%
+25%
Jumpstart
All heroes enter combat with 25% Energy.
+100%
Meteors of Haste
While Meteor Shower is active, all heroes boost their speed by 100%.
-9%
Wormhole Suppressor
Decreases damage dealt by the Wormhole and Wormhole Generator skills by 9%.
10
Chosen by the Stars
After a Meteor Shower, all Healers gain a buff that increases all healing dealt by 100% for the duration of 10 seconds.

+4%
Ingenious Engineers
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Engineers on the team. Each team member deals 4% bonus damage to the Stardome.
10
Chosen by the Stars
After a Meteor Shower, all Healers gain a buff that increases all healing dealt by 100% for the duration of 10 seconds.
+15%
Resilient Grove Keeper
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Grove Keepers on the team. Each team member has a 15% chance to avoid damage when Defense Spheres collide with the Wormhole.

Astral Shield
Triggers an Astral Shield once per battle. The Shield absorbs all damage from Defense Sphere explosions in the Wormhole. The Shield is triggered automatically when 3 or more Defense Spheres enter the Wormhole.
Kajrilisar
100
130
130
130
130
130
64.1K68.4K108K77.9K66.9K69.1K454K15040.9K1.01%0.01%
15
Survivor's Willpower
Defeating a Nightmare generated by Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions grants a 15-second 100% Vampirism aura to the entire team.
10
Chosen by the Stars
After a Meteor Shower, all Healers gain a buff that increases all healing dealt by 100% for the duration of 10 seconds.
12
Immortal Hero
The hero that deals the most damage while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active gains Immortality for 12 seconds.
+15%
Dreamer's Retaliation
All heroes on the team deal 15% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.
+20%
Nightmare's Energy
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the hero that generates the Nightmare gains 20% energy for damage dealt to it.
-10%
Stellar Tank Resilience
Tank heroes take 10% less damage from Defense Sphere basic attacks.
+20%
Marksman Opportunity
If a Marksman uses their ultimate while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active, they will recover 20% energy over 5 seconds.
3
Astral Shield
Triggers an Astral Shield once per battle. The Shield absorbs all damage from Defense Sphere explosions in the Wormhole. The Shield is triggered automatically when 3 or more Defense Spheres enter the Wormhole.

12
Immortal Hero
The hero that deals the most damage while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active gains Immortality for 12 seconds.
15
Survivor's Willpower
Defeating a Nightmare generated by Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions grants a 15-second 100% Vampirism aura to the entire team.
+15%
Dreamer's Retaliation
All heroes on the team deal 15% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.
-10%
Stellar Tank Resilience
Tank heroes take 10% less damage from Defense Sphere basic attacks.
+20%
Nightmare's Energy
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the hero that generates the Nightmare gains 20% energy for damage dealt to it.
10
Chosen by the Stars
After a Meteor Shower, all Healers gain a buff that increases all healing dealt by 100% for the duration of 10 seconds.
+10%
Keeper's Blessing
When Osh the Eternal Keeper awakens, the hero that dealt the most damage before the Planet Parade began will gain 10% more stats.
-50%
Mage's Vigilance
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the Nightmares generated by Mages have 50% less health.
+2%
Sphere Energy Unleashed
Destroying a Defense Sphere grants 2% energy to the hero that deals the final hit.
+25%
Healing Converter
25% of healing exceeding heroes' max health is converted into pure damage dealt to Defense Spheres.
3
Astral Shield
Triggers an Astral Shield once per battle. The Shield absorbs all damage from Defense Sphere explosions in the Wormhole. The Shield is triggered automatically when 3 or more Defense Spheres enter the Wormhole.

130
130
130
130
130
76.1K112K180K140K120K159K786K15067.3M99.34%13.37%
10
Chosen by the Stars
After a Meteor Shower, all Healers gain a buff that increases all healing dealt by 100% for the duration of 10 seconds.
-10%
Stellar Tank Resilience
Tank heroes take 10% less damage from Defense Sphere basic attacks.
+20%
Marksman Opportunity
If a Marksman uses their ultimate while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active, they will recover 20% energy over 5 seconds.
+25%
Healing Converter
25% of healing exceeding heroes' max health is converted into pure damage dealt to Defense Spheres.
+2%
Sphere Energy Unleashed
Destroying a Defense Sphere grants 2% energy to the hero that deals the final hit.
+10%
Keeper's Blessing
When Osh the Eternal Keeper awakens, the hero that dealt the most damage before the Planet Parade began will gain 10% more stats.
3
Astral Shield
Triggers an Astral Shield once per battle. The Shield absorbs all damage from Defense Sphere explosions in the Wormhole. The Shield is triggered automatically when 3 or more Defense Spheres enter the Wormhole.
15
Survivor's Willpower
Defeating a Nightmare generated by Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions grants a 15-second 100% Vampirism aura to the entire team.
12
Immortal Hero
The hero that deals the most damage while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active gains Immortality for 12 seconds.
4
Insomnia
A single use of Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions can't unleash more than 4 Nightmares.
Team 2PFF0000002.27M067.8M013.46%
Kolm

130
130
130
130
130
111K61.6K103K119K127K60.1K582K150184K0.82%0.04%
15
Survivor's Willpower
Defeating a Nightmare generated by Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions grants a 15-second 100% Vampirism aura to the entire team.
10
Chosen by the Stars
After a Meteor Shower, all Healers gain a buff that increases all healing dealt by 100% for the duration of 10 seconds.
12
Immortal Hero
The hero that deals the most damage while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active gains Immortality for 12 seconds.
+15%
Dreamer's Retaliation
All heroes on the team deal 15% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.
3
Astral Shield
Triggers an Astral Shield once per battle. The Shield absorbs all damage from Defense Sphere explosions in the Wormhole. The Shield is triggered automatically when 3 or more Defense Spheres enter the Wormhole.
+25%
Healing Converter
25% of healing exceeding heroes' max health is converted into pure damage dealt to Defense Spheres.
-50%
Mage's Vigilance
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the Nightmares generated by Mages have 50% less health.
+10%
Keeper's Blessing
When Osh the Eternal Keeper awakens, the hero that dealt the most damage before the Planet Parade began will gain 10% more stats.
4
Insomnia
A single use of Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions can't unleash more than 4 Nightmares.
+20%
Nightmare's Energy
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the hero that generates the Nightmare gains 20% energy for damage dealt to it.
+2%
Sphere Energy Unleashed
Destroying a Defense Sphere grants 2% energy to the hero that deals the final hit.
+15%
Jumpstart
All heroes enter combat with 15% Energy.
+100%
Meteors of Haste
While Meteor Shower is active, all heroes boost their speed by 100%.
-3%
Wormhole Suppressor
Decreases damage dealt by the Wormhole and Wormhole Generator skills by 3%.

Ingenious Engineers
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Engineers on the team. Each team member deals 4% bonus damage to the Stardome.

Immortal Hero
The hero that deals the most damage while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active gains Immortality for 12 seconds.

Survivor's Willpower

Chosen by the Stars

Marksman Opportunity

+20%
Nightmare's Energy
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the hero that generates the Nightmare gains 20% energy for damage dealt to it.
+20%
Wakeful Undead
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Undead on the team. Each team member has a 20% chance not to fall asleep while Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is active.
+15%
Dreamer's Retaliation
All heroes on the team deal 15% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.

Keeper's Blessing
When Osh the Eternal Keeper awakens, the hero that dealt the most damage before the Planet Parade began will gain 10% more stats.
+25%
Healing Converter
25% of healing exceeding heroes' max health is converted into pure damage dealt to Defense Spheres.
-10%
Stellar Tank Resilience
Tank heroes take 10% less damage from Defense Sphere basic attacks.
mo-mo
130
130
130
130
130
130
172K159K177K194K175K188K1.07M160185K0.95%0.04%
12
Immortal Hero
The hero that deals the most damage while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active gains Immortality for 12 seconds.
15
Survivor's Willpower
Defeating a Nightmare generated by Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions grants a 15-second 100% Vampirism aura to the entire team.
10
Chosen by the Stars
After a Meteor Shower, all Healers gain a buff that increases all healing dealt by 100% for the duration of 10 seconds.
+20%
Wakeful Undead
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Undead on the team. Each team member has a 20% chance not to fall asleep while Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is active.
+20%
Marksman Opportunity
If a Marksman uses their ultimate while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active, they will recover 20% energy over 5 seconds.
+15%
Dreamer's Retaliation
All heroes on the team deal 15% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.
3
Astral Shield
Triggers an Astral Shield once per battle. The Shield absorbs all damage from Defense Sphere explosions in the Wormhole. The Shield is triggered automatically when 3 or more Defense Spheres enter the Wormhole.
+10%
Keeper's Blessing
When Osh the Eternal Keeper awakens, the hero that dealt the most damage before the Planet Parade began will gain 10% more stats.
+25%
Healing Converter
25% of healing exceeding heroes' max health is converted into pure damage dealt to Defense Spheres.
-10%
Stellar Tank Resilience
Tank heroes take 10% less damage from Defense Sphere basic attacks.

118K67.5K130K190K164K138K807K15033.4M73.32%6.62%
+15%
Defense Sphere Destroyer
Boosts damage dealt to Defense Spheres by 15%.
-15%
Wormhole Suppressor
Decreases damage dealt by the Wormhole and Wormhole Generator skills by 15%.
+100%
Meteors of Haste
While Meteor Shower is active, all heroes boost their speed by 100%.
+25%
Jumpstart
All heroes enter combat with 25% Energy.
10
Chosen by the Stars
After a Meteor Shower, all Healers gain a buff that increases all healing dealt by 100% for the duration of 10 seconds.
+20%
Wakeful Undead
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Undead on the team. Each team member has a 20% chance not to fall asleep while Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is active.
-10%
Stellar Tank Resilience
Tank heroes take 10% less damage from Defense Sphere basic attacks.
3
Astral Shield
Triggers an Astral Shield once per battle. The Shield absorbs all damage from Defense Sphere explosions in the Wormhole. The Shield is triggered automatically when 3 or more Defense Spheres enter the Wormhole.
+2%
Sphere Energy Unleashed
Destroying a Defense Sphere grants 2% energy to the hero that deals the final hit.
+10%
Keeper's Blessing
When Osh the Eternal Keeper awakens, the hero that dealt the most damage before the Planet Parade began will gain 10% more stats.
12
Immortal Hero
The hero that deals the most damage while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active gains Immortality for 12 seconds.
+20%
Nightmare's Energy

+15%
Dreamer's Retaliation
All heroes on the team deal 15% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.
+25%
Healing Converter
25% of healing exceeding heroes' max health is converted into pure damage dealt to Defense Spheres.
-50%
Mage's Vigilance
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the Nightmares generated by Mages have 50% less health.
4
Insomnia
A single use of Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions can't unleash more than 4 Nightmares.
-15%
Defense Sphere Override
Weakens the basic attacks of Defense Spheres by 15%.

10
Chosen by the Stars
After a Meteor Shower, all Healers gain a buff that increases all healing dealt by 100% for the duration of 10 seconds.
+20%
Wakeful Undead
Grants a permanent buff if there are three Undead on the team. Each team member has a 20% chance not to fall asleep while Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is active.
-10%
Stellar Tank Resilience
Tank heroes take 10% less damage from Defense Sphere basic attacks.
3
Astral Shield
Triggers an Astral Shield once per battle. The Shield absorbs all damage from Defense Sphere explosions in the Wormhole. The Shield is triggered automatically when 3 or more Defense Spheres enter the Wormhole.
+2%
Sphere Energy Unleashed
Destroying a Defense Sphere grants 2% energy to the hero that deals the final hit.
+10%
Keeper's Blessing
When Osh the Eternal Keeper awakens, the hero that dealt the most damage before the Planet Parade began will gain 10% more stats.
12
Immortal Hero
The hero that deals the most damage while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active gains Immortality for 12 seconds.
+20%
Nightmare's Energy
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the hero that generates the Nightmare gains 20% energy for damage dealt to it.
+15%
Dreamer's Retaliation
All heroes on the team deal 15% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.
+25%
Healing Converter
25% of healing exceeding heroes' max health is converted into pure damage dealt to Defense Spheres.
-50%
Mage's Vigilance
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the Nightmares generated by Mages have 50% less health.
4
Insomnia
A single use of Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions can't unleash more than 4 Nightmares.
-15%
Defense Sphere Override
Weakens the basic attacks of Defense Spheres by 15%.
Sam 81
130
130
130
130
130
130
118K89.4K84.4K104K79.9K79.7K556K1501.62M3.55%0.32%
+15%
Defense Sphere Destroyer
Boosts damage dealt to Defense Spheres by 15%.
-15%
Wormhole Suppressor
Decreases damage dealt by the Wormhole and Wormhole Generator skills by 15%.
+100%
Meteors of Haste
While Meteor Shower is active, all heroes boost their speed by 100%.
+25%
Jumpstart
All heroes enter combat with 25% Energy.

15
Survivor's Willpower
Defeating a Nightmare generated by Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions grants a 15-second 100% Vampirism aura to the entire team.
+15%
Dreamer's Retaliation
All heroes on the team deal 15% bonus damage against Nightmares for each Nightmare on the battlefield.

Astral Shield

Nightmare's Energy
When Inflicted Slumber or Nightmare Visions is triggered, the hero that generates the Nightmare gains 20% energy for damage dealt to it.
+20%
Marksman Opportunity
If a Marksman uses their ultimate while Planet Parade or Quasar Light is active, they will recover 20% energy over 5 seconds.
